chunks.title: Jeremiah Dictates the Scroll
chunks.reason: Narrative of Jeremiah instructing Baruch to write and read the prophecy.

chunks.title: Reading Before Officials
chunks.reason: Baruch reads the scroll in the temple and officials hear it.

chunks.title: King Jehoiakim Burns the Scroll
chunks.reason: The king reads and burns the scroll despite officials' pleas.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Jehoiakim
chunks.reason: God's command to rewrite the scroll and judgment on the king.

chunks.title: The Second Scroll Written
chunks.reason: Conclusion of the narrative where Baruch writes the new scroll.
